summary: Series knowledge base initialized from Book 1 artifacts. Promoted all world facts (13 locations, 5 cultures, 5 eras, 10 magic rules, 7 factions), 14 character end-states, 12 resolved threads, 14 unresolved threads/sequel hooks, and full name registry. No contradictions found (first book in series). Sequel briefing compiled with 6 must-address and 6 may-explore threads.

artifactsProduced.description: Canonical series-level knowledge base with world facts, character states, resolved/unresolved threads, continuity constraints, name registry, and sequel briefing.
Structured Book 1 summary with chapter-by-chapter synopsis, arc trajectories, structural metrics, mystery box resolutions, symbolic motifs, and sequel hooks.

notes: This is the first book in the series — no prior KB to check against, therefore zero contradictions.
All 15 mystery boxes are marked closed, but some resolutions are partial (e.g., Oathbrand authorization chain not fully traced). These are captured as unresolved threads.
Word counts for Ch7, Ch12, and Ch22 were estimated from final.md file word counts as their metadata.json files had missing or zero wordCount fields.
The polish coordinator's estimate of ~91,850 final words is used as the canonical word count.

Foreshadowing ledger shows 28 entries planted but completionRate field shows 0 — this appears to be a tracking artifact (entries were never formally marked 'paid-off' in the ledger JSON despite being resolved in prose). All major foreshadowing was verified as resolved through chapter prose and mystery box inventory.
